summary.lv: Entain meklē Golang inženieri, kas izstrādās mērogojamus, augstas pieejamības mikropakalpojumus iGaming platformai un nodrošinās to nepārtrauktu piegādi.
summary.en: Entain is hiring a Golang Engineer to build scalable, highly available microservices for its iGaming platform and own their continuous delivery.
